channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House hosting UFC fight tonight on Trump's 80th birthday
item.description: The UFC is hosting a fight series on the White House South Lawn Sunday night.

item.title: "48 Hours" show schedule
item.description: True crime. Real justice. Missing it would be a crime.

item.title: Barking dogs at Iowa kennel provide key evidence in murder case
item.description: A surveillance camera captured dog barking, helping authorities determine when Angela Prichard's estranged husband arrived at the location.

item.title: Could Angela Prichard Have Been Saved?
item.description: A woman repeatedly called police for help when attacked, stalked, and intimidated by her husband. It did not stop him from killing her. "48 Hours" examines the case.
